name: Batch conversion of multiple file types
prompt: I have a folder ./documents with PDF, DOCX, and XLSX files. Convert all of them to markdown.
expected_behavior: Iterate over all supported files in the directory
Use 'uvx markitdown' for each file type
success_criteria: Handles mixed success/failure per file gracefully
Provides summary of what was converted and any errors
edge_cases: Some files unsupported → skip with warning, continue processing others
Very large directory (>100 files) → may take time, suggest processing specific files
Files with spaces in names → handle quoting correctly
